name: Mango Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Fit piecrust into a 9-inch pieplate according to package directions; fold edges under and crimp.
2. Prick the bottom and sides of the piecrust with a fork.
3. Bake at 450°F for 9 to 11 minutes or until golden brown. Set aside to cool.
4. Sprinkle gelatin over lime juice in a small saucepan. Let stand 1 minute.
5. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes or until gelatin dissolves. Remove from heat and stir in condensed milk and rum, if desired.
6. Process mango slices in a food processor or electric blender until smooth.
7. Stir 2 cups mango into the gelatin mixture, reserving the remaining mango for another use; pour into prepared piecrust. Chill until set.
8. Beat whipping cream until foamy. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form. Spread over filling.
9. Garnish with fresh mint sprigs, if desired. Makes 1 (9-inch) pie.
